message.content:
### **Overall Design Overview**  
The webpage follows a **clean, professional, and structured layout** with a dark-to-light color gradient (navy blue → white → orange) to guide user attention. It uses a **mobile-responsive grid system** with clear sectioning, bold typography, and visual hierarchy to communicate information effectively. The design emphasizes trust, expertise, and action-oriented messaging (e.g., CTAs for consultations).


### **Key Sections & Components**  

#### **1. Header & Navigation**  
- **Top Bar**:  
  - Dark navy background with a promotional banner: *"Startup India 2025 Applications Open — Get 100% Tax Exemption for 3 Years"* (white text).  
  - Right-aligned: *"Track Application"* link + phone number `+91 999980 06734` (white text).  
- **Logo & Navigation**:  
  - Left: Orange "Anirah Advisory" logo (with tagline *"Startup Funding Simplified"*).  
  - Center: Horizontal menu with items: *Home, Services, Process, Blog, About, Content, Career, Contact*.  
  - Right: Orange "Start Funding Journey" button.  


#### **2. Hero Section (VISTAR Branding)**  
- **Background**: Dark navy gradient (centered logo: orange "V" icon).  
- **Headline**: Large white text *"VISTAR"* + subtitle *"Brand Building & Investor Readiness | 3 Services"*.  
- **Body Text**: White paragraph explaining VISTAR’s value (transforming businesses into investor-ready brands).  
- **CTAs**: Two buttons:  
  - Orange: *"Get Free Consultation"* (with arrow).  
  - Dark gray: *"Call Us Now"*.  
- **Stats Bar**: Below the hero, four orange/white stat cards:  
  - `200+ Deals Closed`  
  - `100+ Brands Built`  
  - `₹500Cr+ Raised`  
  - `50+ Investors Connected`  


#### **3. Comprehensive VISTAR Solutions**  
- **Section Header**: *"Comprehensive VISTAR Solutions"* (dark gray text) + subtitle *"We cover every aspect of VISTAR to ensure your business gets the complete support it needs."*  
- **Service Cards (3 columns)**:  
  - Each card: Icon (orange), title (dark gray), short description (gray).  
  - Services: *Bhaskar ID Registration, Financial Deck Preparation, Investor Pitch Deck*.  


#### **4. All VISTAR Sub-Services**  
- **Section Header**: *"All VISTAR Sub-Services"* (dark gray) + subtitle *"Comprehensive services under VISTAR to cover every aspect of your business needs."*  
- **Grid Layout (6 cards, 3 columns)**:  
  - Each card: Number (orange), title (dark gray), short description (gray), *"View Details"* link (orange).  
  - Sub-services: *Bhaskar ID, Financial Deck, Investor Deck, Logo Design, Digital Marketing, Website Development*.  


#### **5. Why Choose Our VISTAR Service**  
- **Section Header**: *"Why Choose Our VISTAR Service"* (dark gray).  
- **3-Column Benefits**:  
  - Each: Icon (orange), title (dark gray), description (gray).  
  - Benefits: *Enhanced Visibility, Investor-Ready, Brand Recognition*.  


#### **6. How We Work**  
- **Section Header**: *"How We Work"* (dark gray) + subtitle *"Our structured 4-step process ensures a smooth and transparent experience from start to finish."*  
- **4-Step Process (Vertical Timeline)**:  
  - Each step: Numbered orange circle, title (dark gray), description (gray).  
  - Steps: *Brand Assessment, Strategy & Design, Deck/Digital Creation, Launch & Promotion*.  


#### **7. Eligibility & Required Documents**  
- **Two-Column Layout**:  
  - **Left (Eligibility Criteria)**:  
    - Header: *"Eligibility Criteria"* (dark gray).  
    - Checkmarked list (green icons) of requirements (e.g., *"Registered business entity"*, *"Annual turnover below ₹10 Crores"*).  
  - **Right (Required Documents)**:  
    - Header: *"Required Documents"* (dark gray).  
    - Checkmarked list (orange icons) of docs (e.g., *"Certificate of Incorporation"*, *"Financial Statements"*).  


#### **8. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)**  
- **Section Header**: *"Frequently Asked Questions"* (dark gray) + subtitle *"Got questions about our VISTAR service? We’ve got answers."*  
- **Accordion-Style Q&A**:  
  - 5 expandable questions (dark gray text) with dropdown answers (gray text).  
  - Example: *"What is Bhaskar ID and why do I need it?"*  


#### **9. Call-to-Action (CTA) Section**  
- **Background**: Bright orange.  
- **Headline**: *"Ready to Get Started with VISTAR?"* (white text).  
- **Subheadline**: *"Book a free consultation with our VISTAR experts. We’ll assess your needs and create a customized plan."* (white text).  
- **CTAs**:  
  - White button: *"Book Free Consultation"* (with arrow).  
  - Orange button: `+91 999980 06734` (phone number).  


#### **10. Our Other Services**  
- **Section Header**: *"Our Other Services"* (dark gray).  
- **3-Column Cards**:  
  - Each: Icon (purple/pink), title (dark gray), subtitle (gray), *"Learn More"* link (orange).  
  - Services: *NIDHI (Government Grants), VIKAS (Loans & Capital), PRABANDHIT (Business Planning)*.  


#### **11. Footer**  
- **Top Footer**:  
  - Left: "Anirah Advisory" logo + tagline.  
  - Center: *"Our Services"* (links: *Aarambh, Kavach, Praman, Nidhi, Vikas, Vistar, Prabandhit*).  
  - Right: *"Company"* (links: *About Us, Our Team, Careers, Blog, Contact*) + *"Resources"* (links: *FAQs, Government Schemes, Privacy Policy*).  
- **Middle Footer**:  
  - Address, phone, email (gray text).  
  - Social media icons (gray).  
- **Bottom Footer**:  
  - *"Stay Updated"* (newsletter signup: email input + orange *"Subscribe"* button).  
  - Copyright: *"© 2024 Anirah Advisory. All rights reserved."* + links (*Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Cookie Policy*).  


### **Color Scheme**  
- **Primary**: Navy blue (header/hero), orange (accents/CTAs), white (text).  
- **Secondary**: Gray (subtext), green/orange (icons).  


### **Typography**  
- **Headings**: Bold, sans-serif (e.g., *"VISTAR"*, section titles).  
- **Body Text**: Clean sans-serif (gray/white for readability).  


### **Visual Hierarchy**  
- **Attention-Grabbing**: Orange CTAs, stats, and icons.  
- **Information Flow**: Dark-to-light gradient (hero → white content → orange CTA) guides users downward.  
- **Consistency**: Repeated use of orange for action elements (buttons, stats, icons) creates visual cohesion.  


This design balances professionalism with approachability, using structured sections and clear CTAs to drive user engagement (e.g., booking consultations, exploring services).
